issues.message: When creating path for 'void ZipFileExtensions.ExtractToFile(ZipArchiveEntry source, string destinationFileName, bool overwrite) in method void UpdateManager.ExtractZip(string fileAsync)' from relative archive item path to extract file and the source is an untrusted zip archive, make sure to sanitize relative archive item path 'string ZipArchiveEntry.FullName in method void UpdateManager.ExtractZip(string fileAsync)'
